summary: The average time to approve a new waste hauling license application improved to 120 days in fiscal 2024 as BIC worked through its caseload, but then jumped to 192 days in fiscal 2025 and continued rising afterward. BIC attributes the fiscal 2025 slowdown to a significant loss of staff on the application review team, which increased the workload on remaining staff; the agency's later reports show the same staffing pressure continuing into fiscal 2026.

sources.label: Business Integrity Commission, Fiscal 2025 Mayor's Management Report
Business Integrity Commission, Fiscal 2024 Mayor's Management Report
